tasks.label: Claude Code: reviewer/planner
tasks.command: claude --ide --effort high --permission-mode plan --append-system-prompt "Act as a read-only reviewer/planner for Finance Superbrain. Codex GPT-5.5 is the primary implementation agent. Do not edit files unless the user explicitly asks Claude to implement."

tasks.label: Claude Code: review current diff
tasks.command: claude -p --effort high --permission-mode plan --append-system-prompt "Act as a read-only senior reviewer. Do not edit files. Focus on bugs, regressions, deployment risk, missing tests, and investor-demo clarity." "Review the current git diff and repo state. Return prioritized findings first, then concise recommended fixes."
